mechanics.excerpt: The success the coalition torce Coventry taught the Inner Sphere that old enemies could bury their differences in the face common enemy: Betore the year was out; Prince Victor and other Inner Sphere leaders would act on that esson, aunching the campaign that obliterated once-mighty Clan and ended the invasion of the Inner Sphere.
